purpose: Reproduce the bilingual generation rules used by the 2026-07-23 scheduled run whose Chinese render is 6:18, without copying that episode's topic facts, script, or absolute timings.

precedence.generationRules: The scheduled-6m18 frozen snapshot and its hashed bilingual implementation projects are the only active sources for content organization, narration pace, duration, opening timing, chapter pattern, visual cadence, motion baseline, generated-art ratio, and recaps.
operationalOverlaysAllowed: daily run state machine, recovery, cleanup, and deduplication
current cover deliverables and deterministic cover text
current Tiny Agent asset manifest integrity
fixed bilingual outro copy and alignment
English Postiz publication and public playlist verification
precedence.forbiddenBlending: Rules introduced after the 2026-07-23 03:02-04:17 scheduled run may not alter a generation dimension covered by the frozen snapshot. In particular, do not blend in the later V4 +10 percent rates, 9-12 minute target, one-story requirement, three-module limit, recap removal, 35-45-state target, opening glyph lead, complete-question hold, or later motion choreography.

fixedBilingualGeneration.chapterPattern: chapter opening, body, and spoken three-point recap
fixedBilingualGeneration.opening: voice-synced kinetic question with no early reveal and no later V4 hold
fixedBilingualGeneration.visualReference: 63 scenes, 7 chapters, 15 recap scenes, 15.873 percent temporary generated scenes, 7 motion types, and 29 motion beats in the Chinese reference implementation
